name: OpenClaw Dev
onCreateCommand:
sudo tee /usr/local/bin/openclaw > /dev/null <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
exec node /workspaces/openclaw/scripts/run-node.mjs "$@"
EOF
sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/openclaw
postStartCommand:
ln -sfn /workspaces/.openclaw ~/.openclaw && sudo tee /usr/local/bin/openclaw > /dev/null <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
exec node /workspaces/openclaw/scripts/run-node.mjs "$@"
EOF
sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/openclaw && bash /workspaces/openclaw/scripts/start-gateway.sh
